commands.name: dep-audit
commands.notes: Checks installed versions match requirements-lock.txt. Non-required — pip-audit CVE scan is optional.

commands.name: unit-fast
commands.notes: Fast subset picked up by precommit_gate.ps1 (name matches 'unit', no 'python'/'unittest' exclusion).

commands.name: context-window-check
commands.notes: Warns when CLAUDE.md/MEMORY.md exceed 150 lines; errors at 200 lines (AI-008).

commands.name: journal-archive-check
commands.notes: Preview journal entries eligible for archival (>30 days). Non-required — informational only (AI-009).

commands.name: session-context-report
commands.notes: Human-readable context file size report with progress bars. Run at session start to check compaction health (AI-013).

commands.name: context-window-compact-dry-run
commands.notes: Preview which context files would be compacted based on budget thresholds. Non-required — informational only (TASK-359).

commands.name: prompt-regression
commands.notes: Validates all PromptTemplate entries against regression checklist. Blocks release on failures (AI-002, AI-003).
